output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?judge ?judgeLabel ?lawFirm ?lawFirmLabel WHERE {
  ?judge wdt:P1026 wd:Q1073455 ; wdt:P166 wd:Q218529 ; wdt:P1053 ?lawFirm .
  ?judge rdfs:label ?judgeLabel .
  ?lawFirm rdfs:label ?lawFirmLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?judgeLabel) = "en" && LANG(?lawFirmLabel) = "en")
}
